title: dondia linearis
intro: Dondia linearis, also known as Dondia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Dondia linearis include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. Dondia linearis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
